raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Atalija Akasijus
Mahte redſeja/ ka win-
nas Dehls bija nomir-
ris/ tad zehlahs winna/ un no-
kawewiffu Kehnixa Dsinununu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Joseba ta Kehnixa
Jorania Meita/AkasjusMahfa.
xehme Joafu Akasjus Dehlu/
un pasagge to no ta Kehnixa
Behrneem/ kas nokauti ktua/
lihds ar winna Eminnu gullamâ
Rambari/ un tee apſlehpe winnu
preekſch Atalijas/ ka tas ne tap-
pe nokauts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch bija ar tahs ta
KUNGA Namnâ feschus Gad-
dus apflehpts/ un Atalija waldi-
ja pahr to Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un feptitâ Gaddâ nosuh-
tija Jojadus/ un xehme tohs
Kapteines un Wirfuekus/ un
tohs Pils Karra-Wihrus / un
atwedde tohs pee ſewim eekſch ta
KUNGA Namina/ un darrija
weenu Derribu ar teem/un liſke
teemi ta KUNGA Namnâ sweh-
reht/ un parahdtija teem to Kehni-
ka Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch pawehleja teem/
fazzidams : Schi irr ta Leeta/ ko
juins buhs darriht. Weena tre-
scha Teefa no juins/ kam Sweh-
deena Kahrtâ jastahw/ lai to
Wakti turrs pee ta Kehnixa
Namimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weena trescha Teefalai
stahw pee tahni Wahrtim Sur/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un weena trescha Teesfa pee tahni
Wahrtim pakkat teem Pils Kar-
ra-Wihreem/ta buhs jums Waf-
ti turreht / ka ne kas Namna-
lauschafts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un diwi Pulki no jums/
wiffi/ kas Swehdeenâ no Kahrt-
tas atſtahjahs/ lai to Wakti tur-
eekſch ta KUNGA Namna pe-
ta Kehnixa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un jums buhs ap to feb-
nixu mestees/ ikkatrs ar fawi-
Eerohtfi jawâ Rohkâ. Un kas-
starp fcheein Pulkeein nahk/ tam-
buhs nomirt/ un juhs effeet pee-
ta Kehnixa/ kad winſch iseet un-
ee-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Kapteinies darrija-
pehz wiffu/ ko tas Preesteris Jo-
jadus teem bij pawehlejs/ un ik-
katrs xehme fawus Wihrus/
kam Swehdeenâ Kahrtâ jastahw/
un kas no Swehdeenas Kahrtas
atſtahjahs/ un nahze pee to Pree-
steri Jojadu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris dewe-
teem Kapteinehm Schkehpus un
preekſchturrannas Brunnas/ kas-
tam Kehnixam Dahwidam pee-
derrejufchas/ un eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namna bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Pils Karra-Wihri
stahweja ikkatrs ar fawn Eeroht-
fi fawâ Rohkâ/ no ta Namna-
labbas Puﬀes/ lihds ta Namna-
kreifai Puﬀei/lihds tam Altaram/
un tam Namnam apkahrt to
Kehnixu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch tswedde ta
Kehnixa Dehlu/ un uslikke win-
nam
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
